abilities.name: Ambush Hunter
abilities.text: When this model targets a model with no different enemy models within 6", this model receives a (+).

abilities.name: Deadly Pursuit
abilities.text: During the end phase, this model may move up to 4".

abilities.name: Thrill of Battle
abilities.text: After killing a non-unique enemy, this model may drain a (soulstone) to declare the Charge action, ignoring special restrictions.

actions.name: Three-Headed Bite
actions.costs_and_restrictions: The first raise this action receives increases this action's Dmg by +3 instead of +1.

triggers.name: Onslaught
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting the same model.

triggers.name: Caught Alone
triggers.text: This trigger can only be declared if there are no different enemy models within 6" of the target. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and ignores (fortitude), (warding), and (soulstone) abilities.

actions.name: Aggressive Leap
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range. Until the end of the current activation, it may not declare the Interact action.

triggers.name: Slip By
triggers.text: This model gains a Hastened token.
